---
title: "Track: Modeling (one-arm)"
page-layout: full
---

## When to use this track

Choose this path if you want density estimation and prediction for a single outcome \(y\), optionally with covariates \(X\), and optionally with a spliced GPD tail.

## Path (recommended)

### Bulk-only (unconditional → conditional)

1. [ex01 — Unconditional DPM (CRP)](../examples/ex01-unconditional-dpm-crp.html)
2. [ex02 — Unconditional DPM (SB)](../examples/ex02-unconditional-dpm-sb.html)
3. [ex05 — Conditional DPM (CRP)](../examples/ex05-conditional-dpm-crp.html)
4. [ex06 — Conditional DPM (SB)](../examples/ex06-conditional-dpm-sb.html)
### Bulk + tail (GPD augmentation)

5. [ex03 — Unconditional DPM+GPD (CRP)](../examples/ex03-unconditional-dpmgpd-crp.html)
6. [ex04 — Unconditional DPM+GPD (SB)](../examples/ex04-unconditional-dpmgpd-sb.html)
7. [ex07 — Conditional DPM+GPD (CRP)](../examples/ex07-conditional-dpmgpd-crp.html)
8. [ex08 — Conditional DPM+GPD (SB)](../examples/ex08-conditional-dpmgpd-sb.html)
## Concepts to read alongside (non-redundant)

- [Model umbrella](../advanced/model-umbrella.qmd)
- [Theory: GPD tails + DPM bulk + splicing](../advanced/theory/01-gpd-dp-setup.qmd)

<!-- cmgpd-footer:start -->
## Prereqs
- Required packages and data for this page are listed in the setup chunks above.

## Outputs
- This page renders model fits, diagnostics, and summary artifacts generated by package APIs.

## Interpretation
- Canonical concept page: [Model Umbrella](../advanced/model-umbrella.qmd)
- Treat this page as an application/example view and use the canonical page for core definitions.

## Next
- Continue to the linked canonical concept page, then return for implementation-specific details.
<!-- cmgpd-footer:end -->
